---
title: Start a flow from a template
sidebar_position: 1
---

# Start a flow from a template

Mindflow provides a library of ready-to-use templates designed to help you quickly start automate in your environment. These templates serve as a foundation for building automation flows and can be easily imported with a simple copy/paste.

## 1\. Where to find templates

All available templates are listed on our public use case library: 👉 [https://mindflow.io/use-cases](https://mindflow.io/use-cases)

Each template includes a description of the use case it addresses and the corresponding JSON file you can copy.

1.  **How to Import a Template into Your Environment**

To import a template into your Mindflow environment:

2.  **Browse the Template Library**

Go to [https://mindflow.io/use-cases](https://mindflow.io/use-cases) and select the template that fits your needs.

3.  **Copy the JSON Content**

Each use case page includes a prebuilt template in JSON format. Copy the entire content by simple clicking on the `Import` button (in the bottom right corner) like so :

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku..png?workspaceId=55643b90-7434-4228-a0b9-5da0d2b83aaf)

The file of the flow you want to import is now in your clipboard, ready to be pasted !

2.  **Access Your Mindflow Environment**

Log in to your Mindflow be mindful and **select the environment** in which you want **to import the flow** :

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku..png?workspaceId=55643b90-7434-4228-a0b9-5da0d2b83aaf)

3.  **Paste flow**

In the top right section, click on the three dots next to `+ Create flow` to access the drop-down menu and just click on `Paste flow`

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku..png?workspaceId=55643b90-7434-4228-a0b9-5da0d2b83aaf)

The template is now being imported !

## Best Practices

-   **Always review and adapt the template to your specific needs**. Templates are a starting point and usually require adjustments to align with your environment and processes.

-   **Add credentials**. Templates do not include authentication details - be sure to connect the required accounts and services.

-   **Customize inputs and data fields**. Modify variables, triggers … To match your requirements.

If you encounter any issues or need assistance selecting the right template, feel free to contact your Customer Success Manager or reach out to support.
